overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rainy dystopian urban environment in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), starting near industrial pipes and moving along a muddy path beneath a highway overpass toward the neon-lit Rancho Coronado district. Heavy rain and hazy atmospheric conditions persist throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial outskirts with large rusted pipes

events.description: black SUV drives past on the elevated road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a muddy path beside industrial infrastructure, approaching a highway overpass

notable_agents.action: black SUV traveling along the road parallel to the dirt path

entered.detail: large rusted industrial pipes running parallel to the path
red and white striped concrete barrier separating the dirt path from the road
large concrete highway overpass spanning across the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rainy industrial outskirts area with large rusted pipes on the left and a concrete barrier on the right. The camera moves forward along a muddy dirt path as a black SUV passes by on the adjacent road, heading toward a distant highway overpass visible through the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath highway overpass with city view ahead

events.description: enters the sheltered area beneath the highway overpass, reducing rain exposure
game UI notification 'RANCHO CORONADO' appears indicating entry into new district

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass toward the glowing city lights visible in the distance

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboards visible through the rain in the distance
street lamps mounted on the overpass structure casting light downward

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the highway overpass, the scene becomes darker and more sheltered from the rain. The industrial pipes and road barrier fall behind as the camera advances through the concrete underpass, with the glowing digital billboards and city skyline of Rancho Coronado becoming visible ahead through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland approaching large digital billboards

events.description: emerges from under the overpass into the open area dominated by large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive illuminated billboards while moving through muddy terrain with scattered vegetation

entered.detail: dilapidated small structures and shacks visible on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the overpass, the camera emerges into an open wasteland area approaching the massive glowing digital billboards of Rancho Coronado. The highway structure recedes to the left as abandoned shacks become visible on the left side, while the camera continues toward the towering illuminated advertisements through the persistent heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bleak industrial periphery into the neon-lit expanse of the Rancho Coronado district. It begins on a muddy dirt path flanked by rusted pipes and a concrete barrier, moving forward as a black SUV passes by toward a distant highway overpass. As the camera advances beneath the concrete structure, the environment grows darker and more sheltered, leaving the industrial pipes behind while the glowing city skyline begins to emerge through the heavy rain. The scene then opens into a desolate wasteland as the camera emerges from the underpass, passing abandoned shacks on the left. Finally, the highway structure recedes into the distance as the camera pushes forward toward towering, illuminated digital billboards that pierce through the persistent downpour.
